title: Enchantment Recipes
description: Adds recipes for most commonly used high-end enchantments
body:
This datapack adds recipes for following enchantments:
- Efficiency 5
- Fortune 3
- Looting 3
- Protection 4
- Sharpness 5
- Unbreaking 3
- Depth Strider 3
- Feather Falling 3
- Respiration 3
- Swift Sneak 3
- Silk Touch
- Aqua Affinity
- Mending

Use vanilla recipe book in the crafting table or your favourite recipe viewer (JEI, REI) to see the recipes.


<details>
<summary>Recipe preview</summary>

![Main version recipe showcase in vanila recipe book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/468940705f519d9fa970e502d348282715a0525b.png)

</details>



Note: this datapack includes 2 versions:
The main version, that uses netherite scrap and ingots in some recipes, and the "nerfed version" that replaces netherite scrap with diamonds and netherite ingots with diamond blocks. Choose whichever you prefer.
